seo.title: Best Plumber in Dallas, TX | GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply
seo.description: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply offers expert plumbing and fire protection services in Dallas. 24/7 emergency service, upfront pricing, and guaranteed work. Call (469) 771-1800.

hero.eyebrow: Dallas's Premier Plumbing & Fire Protection Company
hero.headline: Reliable Plumbing & Fire Safety Solutions for Your Home or Business
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full fire suppression systems, we deliver fast, professional service with upfront pricing and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: Complete Plumbing Solutions for Every Need
featureSections.body: Whether it's a leaky faucet or a full repipe, our licensed plumbers handle it all with precision and care. We use state-of-the-art equipment to diagnose issues quickly and provide lasting fixes.
featureSections.cardBody: We don't just fix pipes; we protect your property. Every job comes with a workmanship guarantee so you can rest easy.

featureSections.title: Fire Safety Systems That Meet Code & Protect Lives
featureSections.body: From design to installation and maintenance, we provide comprehensive fire protection services for commercial and residential properties. Stay compliant and safe.
featureSections.cardBody: Our systems are designed to meet all local and national fire codes, ensuring your property passes inspection every time.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection. We meet all Texas state requirements.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No surprises. You'll know the cost before we start any work, and we stand by our estimates.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most calls are answered within 24 hours. Emergency services arrive within 2 hours.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we'll make it right. Our work is backed by a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

testimonials.quote: GPFS responded to my emergency pipe burst on a Sunday. They were at my door in 45 minutes and had everything fixed by evening. Professional and fair priced.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We used GPFS for a full fire sprinkler retrofit in our office building. The team was meticulous, on time, and kept our workspace clean. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: James L.

testimonials.quote: I've used GPFS for both plumbing and fire protection at my rental properties. They're reliable, communicate well, and their pricing is transparent.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

cta.headline: Ready to Solve Your Plumbing or Fire Safety Needs?
cta.subheadline: Call us now or schedule online for a free estimate. We're here to help 24/7.

servicesPage.intro: At GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply, we offer a full range of plumbing and fire protection services for homes and businesses in Dallas. Our licensed technicians bring years of experience, modern equipment, and a commitment to quality. Whether you need a quick repair or a complete system installation, we deliver reliable solutions that last.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency service for burst pipes, sewer backups, and more.
services.longDescription: Plumbing emergencies don't wait for business hours. That's why GPFS offers round-the-clock emergency service. Our rapid response team arrives within 2 hours to assess and fix the issue, minimizing damage to your property. From frozen pipes to overflowing toilets, we handle it all with professionalism and speed.
benefits: Temporary fixes to prevent further damage

process.title: Call & Dispatch
process.description: Call our emergency line. We gather details and dispatch the nearest technician immediately.

process.title: Rapid Assessment
process.description: Our technician arrives, diagnoses the problem, and provides a clear estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair & Cleanup
process.description: We complete the repair efficiently, test the system, and clean the work area thoroughly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We aim to arrive within 2 hours for all emergency calls. In many cases, we're there within 60 minutes.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency service?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a modest after-hours fee, but we always provide the estimate upfront so there are no surprises.

services.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert water heater services including tankless and traditional units.
services.longDescription: Don't settle for cold showers. GPFS installs, repairs, and maintains all types of water heaters: tank, tankless, and hybrid. We help you choose the right size and energy-efficient model for your home, then install it professionally. Our repair services can extend the life of your existing unit and restore hot water fast.
benefits: Free consultation on best unit for your home

process.title: Inspection & Recommendation
process.description: We assess your current system, water usage, and budget to recommend the best solution.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our team installs the unit per manufacturer specs and local codes, ensuring safety and efficiency.

process.title: Testing & Walkthrough
process.description: We test the system, show you how to operate it, and answer any questions.

faqs.question: How long does a water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: A typical installation takes 2-4 hours. Tankless units may take longer due to venting and gas line modifications.

faqs.question: What size water heater do I need?
faqs.answer: For a family of 4, a 50-gallon tank is standard. We'll calculate your peak hour demand to recommend the perfect size.

services.title: Fire Sprinkler Systems
services.shortDescription: Design, installation, and maintenance of fire sprinkler systems.
services.longDescription: Protect your property and occupants with a reliable fire sprinkler system. GPFS designs and installs systems for commercial and residential buildings, ensuring full compliance with NFPA and local codes. We also provide annual inspections, testing, and maintenance to keep your system ready.
benefits: Custom design for your building layout

process.title: Site Survey & Design
process.description: We evaluate your building, occupancy, and fire risks to create a tailored sprinkler design.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our certified technicians install piping, sprinkler heads, and control panels with minimal disruption.

process.title: Testing & Certification
process.description: We test the system thoroughly and provide certification documents for insurance and code compliance.

faqs.question: Do I need a fire sprinkler system for my business?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by building type and occupancy. We can help you determine if a system is required or recommended.

faqs.question: How often should sprinkler systems be inspected?
faqs.answer: NFPA 25 requires annual inspections. We offer maintenance plans to ensure your system stays compliant.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Sewer Services
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning and sewer line repair using advanced technology.
services.longDescription: Clogged drains and sewer backups are messy and stressful. GPFS uses hydro-jetting and video camera inspection to clear blockages and identify underlying issues. We repair or replace damaged sewer lines with trenchless technology when possible, saving your landscaping and driveway.
benefits: Video camera inspection for accurate diagnosis
Hydro-jetting removes grease, roots, and debris
Trenchless repair options to minimize digging

process.title: Camera Inspection
process.description: We insert a camera into the drain to locate the blockage and assess pipe condition.

process.title: Clearing the Blockage
process.description: Using hydro-jetting or auger, we remove the obstruction thoroughly.

process.title: Post-Clearing Inspection
process.description: We re-inspect with camera to confirm the line is clear and recommend repairs if needed.

faqs.question: What causes sewer line backups?
faqs.answer: Common causes include tree root intrusion, grease buildup, and pipe corrosion. Our camera inspection identifies the exact cause.

faqs.question: How long does drain cleaning take?
faqs.answer: Most drain cleaning jobs are completed within 1-2 hours. Sewer line repairs may take longer depending on the method.

about.headline: Your Dallas Partner in Plumbing & Fire Protection
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners and businesses with reliable, code-compliant plumbing and fire protection services delivered with integrity, transparency, and exceptional craftsmanship.
story: GPFS Plumbing & Fire Supply was founded by a team of licensed plumbers and fire protection specialists who saw a gap in the market: companies that excelled in one area but couldn't offer integrated solutions. We combined our expertise to serve Dallas properties comprehensively, from fixing a leaky pipe to installing a full fire suppression system.

Today, we're proud to be a trusted name in the community. Our team continues to train on the latest technologies and codes, ensuring every job meets the highest standards. We believe in treating customers like neighbors — with respect, honesty, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, and we always provide honest advice — even if it means recommending a less expensive solution.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade materials and follow best practices to ensure every installation or repair stands the test of time.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: From plumbing to fire protection, safety is paramount. We strictly follow codes and safety protocols.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and give back through local sponsorships and free safety inspections for nonprofits.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with GPFS
contact.subheadline: Call us, email, or fill out the form below. We'll respond within 1 business day.
